contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: CDN purge automation + credentialing reprocess never-downgrade guard (permalink protection)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-credentials/pull/15
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/333
  
  Details:
  Shipped both parked follow-ups from the oracle-credential thread. (1) lineage-credentials build-cv-cache workflow now purges jsDelivr (the credential pages' primary CDN, 12h+ branch cache) for materially changed CV JSONs after each rebuild commit — filtered to diffs beyond the per-run generated_at timestamp line so ~750 noise purges per run don't hammer the purge API, capped 100/run; authored via API per the repo-class policy (no clone of the API-only repo). (2) Investigated the GAS Payload-JSON capture failure: the parser regex actually matches the recorded texts, but discovered a live clobber threat en route — reprocessCredentialingRow rebuilds event files from the original message and recommits, which would revert the backfilled oracle source_url permalinks to bare URLs via the 10-minute auto-backfill or the anonymous reprocess endpoint, since all 9 grounding intake rows sat PROCESSED with empty col M (armed). Mitigated immediately by filling intake col M from the original texts (auto-backfill now skips the rows), and patched the canonical GAS with fetchExistingPracticeEvent plus a never-downgrade guard (keep existing source_url when it extends the re-parse; keep existing payload when re-parse yields none). Clasp deploy of the patched GAS is staged but blocked on operator clasp login (local and box .clasprc.json tokens are empty). PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-credentials/pull/15 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/333
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
